name: Pulse Border
description: Rounded corners and a window border that breathes between two colours on a smooth cycle, with an optional brightness dip at the low end. The pulse dims when the surface loses focus. Width, corner radius, pulse speed, dip depth and the two colours are this pack's own parameters.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Roundness of the corners (px, 0 for square)

parameters.name: Pulse speed
parameters.description: How many pulse cycles play per second

parameters.name: Dip depth
parameters.description: How far the border fades at the low end of the pulse, where 0 keeps it solid

parameters.name: First colour
parameters.description: Colour at the top of the pulse

parameters.name: Second colour
parameters.description: Colour at the bottom of the pulse
